name: strategy_review
description: Review strategic goals for alignment, progress, and risk. Generates evidence-backed status synthesis for executive and strategy modes.
intent: Evaluate strategic goal health and generate status narrative
agentInstructions: When invoked, read the goal record from Odoo, collect evidence from linked tasks and key results, synthesize a status narrative with citations, and assess risk level. Never invent progress data. Confidence below 0.85 triggers human review.
